fields.description:
Code to be used as a tool, should have a function main.

Note: Certain import statements are allowed but attribute access is not allowed. So to use an imported value import the item instead of the module.
Eg: from requests import get instead of import requests
fields.label: Code

fields.description: Tool definition can either be a custom function defined in Code or an existing function pointed to by Path.
fields.label: Definition

fields.description: Tool description of how the tool is to be called, and what return value should be expected.
fields.label: Description

fields.description: If the main function in Code is has type annotations, this list can be auto generated. Arg descriptions still need to be added.
fields.label: Args

fields.description: Snake cased name of the tool
fields.label: Slug

fields.description: Reason for why tool is invalid.
fields.label: Reason
